level_signals: 7+ years of program management, business operations, or management consulting experience
Lead and manage day-to-day operations of large-scale transformational projects
Accountable for building and driving large-scale transformational initiatives end to end

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 7+ years of program management, business operations, or management consulting experience, preferably in a GTM/Sales Operations organization
must_haves.qualifier: preferably in a GTM/Sales Operations organization

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Demonstrated organizational, project management and execution skills with ability to own cross-functional projects
An ability to drive sales territory planning and align strategies across all segments to ensure seamless execution
Strong track record as a strategic, analytical problem solver and skilled operator with the demonstrated ability to successfully deploy new initiatives end to end
A high degree of comfort working quickly in a high growth and fast-paced environment
An ability to seamlessly transition from the high level to very detailed, and a willingness to "roll up your sleeves"
A detail-oriented and analytical individual with business acumen, and the ability to influence and communicate within all levels of the organization

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Knowledge of Customer Relationship Manager (CRM) systems
Data Analytics (Google Sheets/Excel data manipulation, SQL)

scope.surface: GTM Planning — sales territory planning, planning cycle operations, cross-functional program management
primary_metrics_inferred: Cross-functional program adoption and change management success
core_responsibilities: Lead and manage day-to-day operations of large-scale transformational projects
Develop detailed project plans, set milestones, and ensure program integrity
Design solutions for process improvements and tool development
Coordinate with key stakeholders and leadership to align complex programs and secure buy-in
Partner cross-functionally across all departments to influence and execute
Build and drive large-scale transformational initiatives end to end
Create roadmaps, project plans, change management plans, tasks and reporting methodologies
Manage change management activities across stakeholder engagement
Influence and adopt the use of tooling, including AI-based levers, to make planning processes more efficient

green_flags: Clear articulation of team mission and cross-functional partners
Explicit statement that preferred qualifications are a bonus, not a requirement — encourages applications from qualified candidates
Role has defined ownership: end-to-end accountability for large-scale transformational initiatives
red_flags: Location not specified anywhere in the JD — work arrangement (remote/hybrid/onsite) is completely unclear
Visa sponsorship and work authorization requirements not mentioned

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from 7+ years requirement and scope of responsibilities)
seniority.manages_people (inferred from responsibilities language; no direct reports mentioned)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly stated)
location.type (set to 'unclear'; no location or work arrangement stated in JD)
ambiguities: The minimum requirement states '7+ years of program management, business operations, or management consulting experience, preferably in a GTM/Sales Operations organization' — the 'preferably' qualifier makes the GTM/Sales Ops context a soft preference, but the 7+ years itself is hard. Treated as hard for years, with GTM preference noted in qualifier field.
Location is entirely unstated — could be any Stripe office or remote. Flagged as 'unclear'.
